description: Phase 0 Foundation — Scaffolding, feature flag, SDK integration, Stability Pool ABI, and foundational utilities for the Borrow section of app.mento.org

userStories.title: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_BORROW feature flag
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the borrow tab gated behind a feature flag so we can develop without exposing unfinished work in production.
acceptanceCriteria: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_BORROW to apps/app.mento.org/app/env.mjs using same pattern as NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_DEBUG: z.enum(['true', 'false']).optional().default('false')
Add to .env.example with a comment explaining its purpose
Set to 'true' in .env.development or .env.local
Borrow tab in header.tsx (the tabs array around line 49) only renders when flag is 'true'
Borrow section in page.tsx (the 'Coming soon' block around line 66) only renders when flag is 'true'
When flag is 'false', the borrow tab is completely hidden from navigation
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Install Mento SDK beta with BorrowService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need @mento-protocol/mento-sdk (beta with BorrowService) in packages/web3 so borrow hooks can call SDK methods.
acceptanceCriteria: Update @mento-protocol/mento-sdk in packages/web3/package.json to the beta version that includes BorrowService (check npm: npm view @mento-protocol/mento-sdk versions)
If the SDK uses a catalog: reference, update the version in the workspace catalog (pnpm-workspace.yaml or package.json catalog field)
pnpm install succeeds without peer dependency conflicts
import { BorrowService } from '@mento-protocol/mento-sdk' compiles without errors
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Define frontend-specific borrow types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript types that supplement the SDK so the UI and hooks have consistent type contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file packages/web3/src/features/borrow/types.ts
Define DebtTokenConfig interface with fields: symbol (string), currencySymbol (string), currencyCode (string), locale (string)
Define BorrowView type: 'dashboard' | 'open-trove' | { view: 'manage-trove'; troveId: string } | 'earn' | 'redeem'
Define StabilityPoolPosition interface with fields: deposit (bigint), collateralGain (bigint), debtTokenGain (bigint)
Create a DEBT_TOKEN_CONFIGS record with at least GBPm defined: { symbol: 'GBPm', currencySymbol: '£', currencyCode: 'GBP', locale: 'en-GB' }
Re-export SDK types the UI needs (BorrowPosition, LoanDetails, SystemParams, CallParams) — if not exported by SDK, define compatible interfaces
All types are exported
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Scaffold borrow directories in packages/web3
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the packages/web3/src/features/borrow/ directory structure created following existing swap/ and pools/ patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Create directory: packages/web3/src/features/borrow/
Create sdk.ts — placeholder BorrowService factory (import BorrowService, export a factory function stub)
Create hooks/index.ts — empty barrel export
Create atoms/index.ts — empty barrel export
Create stability-pool/index.ts — empty barrel export
Create tx-flows/index.ts — empty barrel export
Create leverage/index.ts — empty barrel export
Create index.ts — barrel export that re-exports from types.ts and all sub-modules
Export borrow module from packages/web3/src/index.ts (or the features barrel, following how swap/pools are exported)
tsup build succeeds: pnpm --filter @repo/web3 build
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: types.ts was created in US-003. This story creates the directory structure around it.

userStories.title: Scaffold borrow component directory and navigation atom
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the borrow components directory in the app with a placeholder view and navigation atom, replacing the Coming soon text.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/borrow-view.tsx — renders a simple placeholder (e.g. a heading 'Borrow')
Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/atoms/borrow-navigation.ts — exports borrowViewAtom with type BorrowView, initial value 'dashboard'
Update page.tsx to import and render <BorrowView /> inside the borrow tab conditional (replacing the Coming soon span)
BorrowView only renders when NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_BORROW is 'true' (uses the feature flag from US-001)
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: switching to the Borrow tab shows the new placeholder

userStories.title: Create useBorrowService hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a useBorrowService() hook that returns a cached BorrowService instance backed by wagmi's public client.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-borrow-service.ts
Uses usePublicClient() from wagmi to get the viem PublicClient
Uses useChainId() from wagmi to detect chain
Caches BorrowService instance — only recreates when publicClient or chainId changes (useMemo or ref-based cache)
Returns BorrowService instance (or null if client not ready)
Also update sdk.ts to contain the factory logic if cleaner separation is needed
Export from packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/index.ts
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create send-tx bridge for SDK CallParams
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sendSdkTransaction() and waitForTx() functions to bridge SDK CallParams to wagmi sendTransaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/tx-flows/send-tx.ts
sendSdkTransaction(wagmiConfig, callParams, gasHeadroom?) converts SDK CallParams ({to, data, value} as strings/hex) to wagmi format and calls sendTransaction from @wagmi/core
Default gasHeadroom is 0.25 (25% buffer)
waitForTx(wagmiConfig, hash) wraps waitForTransactionReceipt and returns TransactionReceipt
Error normalization: user rejected -> 'Transaction rejected by user', reverted -> 'Transaction reverted: [reason]', insufficient funds -> 'Insufficient funds for transaction', other -> pass through
Export from packages/web3/src/features/borrow/tx-flows/index.ts
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Extract Stability Pool ABI from BOLD
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the StabilityPool ABI in our codebase so Phase 1 can build direct-contract read hooks (the SDK does not cover stability pools).
acceptanceCriteria: Copy ABI from /home/sol/projects/bold/frontend/app/src/abi/StabilityPool.ts
Place at packages/web3/src/features/borrow/stability-pool/abi.ts
Export as typed const: export const stabilityPoolAbi = [...] as const
Verify ABI includes key functions: provideToSP, withdrawFromSP, getDepositorCollGain, getDepositorYieldGain, getTotalBoldDeposits, getCompoundedBoldDeposit
Export from packages/web3/src/features/borrow/stability-pool/index.ts
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: The BOLD reference repo is at /home/sol/projects/bold/. Copy the ABI as-is — it's auto-generated TypeScript. Adapt only the export style if needed.

userStories.title: Create FX-aware currency formatting utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need formatting functions that display amounts in correct local currency format (e.g. £1,234.56 for GBPm).
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/format.ts
formatDebtAmount(amount: bigint, debtToken: DebtTokenConfig): string — converts 18-decimal bigint to locale-formatted string with currency symbol (e.g. £1,234.56)
formatCollateralAmount(amount: bigint): string — formats as '1,234.56 USDm'
formatPrice(price: bigint, debtToken: DebtTokenConfig): string — formats as '£0.79 per USDm'
formatInterestRate(rate: bigint): string — converts 18-decimal rate to percentage (e.g. '5.50%')
formatLtv(ltv: bigint): string — converts 18-decimal ratio to percentage (e.g. '72.3%')
All functions handle null/undefined input gracefully returning '—' or similar placeholder
Use Intl.NumberFormat with locale from DebtTokenConfig for locale-aware formatting
Export from packages/web3/src/features/borrow/index.ts
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Extract leverage math from BOLD
userStories.description: As a developer, I need leverage/multiply math functions from BOLD extracted as pure functions for Phase 5 use.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/leverage/math.ts
Extract from /home/sol/projects/bold/frontend/app/src/liquity-leverage.ts: getOpenLeveragedTroveParams, getLeverUpTroveParams, getLeverDownTroveParams, getCloseFlashLoanAmount
All functions must be pure — no side effects, no contract calls, no imports from BOLD codebase
Convert BOLD's Dnum types to bigint parameters (matching SDK conventions)
Each function has a brief JSDoc comment explaining purpose and parameters
Export from packages/web3/src/features/borrow/leverage/index.ts
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: BOLD uses Dnum (a decimal number library). When converting, preserve precision by using bigint with 18 decimal places (1e18 = 100%).
